summary: Pastebin application with paste creation and viewing functionality
architectural_notes: Frontend correctly extracts and validates paste IDs using legacy numeric format
Backend canister stores pastes with numeric IDs
known_issues: Paste not found error after creation - ID 1771799269632900371 validated on frontend but not retrievable from backend
Draft editor shows 'disallowed origin' error for https://molecular-lavender-hsv-draft.caffeine.xyz
Possible mismatch between paste creation storage and retrieval logic in backend canister

existing_features.title: Add frontend error handling to display detailed backend error messages when a paste is not found, including the attempted paste ID and any backend diagnostic information returned in the error response.

new_feature_requests.summary: Debug and fix the backend paste storage issue where paste ID 1771799269632900371 is not being found after creation. Verify that the createPaste function properly stores the paste data in the backend canister's state and that the getPaste function can retrieve it using the same ID format.

Add backend logging to the createPaste and getPaste functions to track paste ID generation, storage operations, and retrieval attempts. Log the paste ID format, storage confirmation, and any retrieval failures with diagnostic information.

Verify that the paste ID type consistency between createPaste (which returns the ID) and getPaste (which accepts the ID as parameter) matches. Ensure both functions use the same ID representation (Nat vs Text vs custom type) throughout the storage and retrieval flow.

projectName: Fix paste not found error after creation
